description_long: This is a women's open-toe slip-on sandal featuring wide, criss-crossed leather straps in a light beige or blush color. The footbed appears to be contoured and cushioned, with a tan suede-like finish and a visible brand label at the heel. The midsole has a cork-like texture, adding both style and comfort, while the outsole is made of a darker, grippy rubber material. The sandal is flat with a slight heel rise for ergonomic support. The overall design is casual yet elegant, suitable for urban environments such as sidewalks, parks, or shopping areas.
description: A women's slip-on sandal with wide, criss-crossed light leather straps, a cork-textured midsole, and a cushioned footbed. The design is casual and comfortable, ideal for urban wear.
description_view_0: Side view showing the criss-crossed straps, cork-textured midsole, and cushioned footbed.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the open toe and the overlapping straps forming a wide opening.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the continuous strap design and the full length of the sandal.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the heel area, brand label on the footbed, and the sandal's open back.
attribute_logo: Circular white logo with 'Sofft' text, located on the heel area of the footbed.
